---
layout: default
title: "National Political and Policy Brief: July 14, 2026"
date: 2026-07-14T15:54:41.596163+00:00
summary: "The Supreme Court reviews education and citizenship policies while Parliament debates women's reservation and the government tightens trade regulations"
run_time_ist: "9:24PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 9:24PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Language Policy:</strong> The Supreme Court has declined to stay the CBSE’s three-language policy, issuing notices to the Centre, CBSE, and NCERT while noting that nearly half of affiliated schools already comply.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimAFBVV95cUxPb29LaDFRaVZNOHJnVndJX2lHMHpLdUJ2TWJiOXpxbjk3ZG1HY1ZmYTNQc2otdnhiTW5vdnhBOU96d3BreE53ZGE5Qk1OY3U5RVdPTjJtWmRXaV9KUktabWRGc3BPOU1LU0l6SThyUVVSUzlfVkNQVzRNYm9lRXdmVEcwaTNpemYtSkVBZ3lPWTJKemh1eDJzbw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxNNWk0aE4wTkJERnIxa0FmbVU3U0R3VnBTZTREN0taejExX1Nvek1jX3EtbTE1X0xWWFljSVpKVHJyRm9fWk1GVDlrYmd4QlJfUkU0LVIxc19tODdvNkgyQ3M0Y2dpeVZfRDRrcU1mRmVWUWxPODcwb21UaHh5SURBOWkzZ1Z5UWNoOXAzMEk1aXJiYXhBYWZJdFJGQVU3dw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirgFBVV95cUxPdzVCdkpnSlJsak1RajhCdC1CVHV0bXVEdzB2SWJ6WFRuQlVLb2RSVGVvOElXMVFUN3Z4dzJjUmgxcFJJQWRGdlpHTVNvVEZVTC1VMDA0M0E1S0c5WnM5NHB2UUNkNjRMc2RyQXRTdVBTb1hWZXpLV2s1bHBKMzhkdEE2ZDlOZDNybkZqeTRGYWswWkc3SjJOSDhST3E2MDdldFgtN3VzX3lhcTZiWnc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwgFBVV95cUxNY0JTSjdzUHJjREM3ME9xa2VZRXloV0FnbzI1Rmw4Z2QyNmlpaHdQR1huV1pEaW5uLW9iUkhUSmRCOFlycHJjYVVSWVh6YTl6VjR4OUFNMUZ5aGRONXY1WmR5dzlKeHdsLS1uTXF1U3NiZFlJajR0SXpzUjJtOUtTTjFpTkx1czJXR2lET2FNZDVKVkltY2Y5YU03X21VamJ4MUp2V1NmakFaN1pfb2xfUlJ0T05CSnVrOGdiNHprZTJyUQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitgFBVV95cUxOdnpEVHc2d24xQXpkMHV5SkVsTXAwRnRxX3VYQnY3OExtSG1JTmhNbU9hUzVrVlF0MVRYTW1sUFl5YkhpWWt4cE1EUUNDd0ZrY196Mm51cW56Y01DWDVQdlVVY295cjVDbEhVZzBTRkt2VFdvYmVFVnE1S3lKenBha2pVUTNpVGNHT19uazZlNGFBUW5OWWliYm5ySzRSRUZaT2xpdkR4WFloMHg4ZFExZVBVOEk5QQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I9</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMizAFBVV95cUxNVDhaSUt0dmZXdHliakhyM0hiejFQTEZTekFDZkwwYmMtX1AzYXdKMTBzZ3RhREdXQkFNbHhuemdwTlp6dUV3aVFNR2RleWpDaGR3Xy13R0xORlk0UWJ3SENmN0ItU3JaNHpjdERtV3ZVaFV3VGJKU0hRV0VWOGllSlEzM1JHNUhNWWZyZTdPTUlvcWhId3d6V29yaW90RUhveFVubGJSR01kSTc5Mk9yWk9oTjBrTHpfclJJQnZZUUd6dkk0U2tSaE9oOV_SAdIBQVVfeXFMTmJrVXNPVjNDeGhUUkxGWG0ta3VHSXN1YVdJYWUtRWszR1V5Sy01QmFyUzJBZGU0bGdOOTctelV5ZVRlV1FQYmV0NnVaVThLT1RVaEg5ZzctSlBLLVpMb3dBTmhyMWxlQnF2TkhiZjZlZm5aOTNoeEpjc0VlSnQ3ZXhxWkI1MUpDZHVEOEVpYm5PTW9tM1V3OGluUVdLMk5wcDlyWHppQ2hsY3FEdndJLVh5TTNMdzl6TEExS2tOeTFZRy01YkpHcmJMdUpuYTNYdHFn?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I12</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Women&#x27;s Reservation:</strong> The Lok Sabha continues to deliberate on the Constitutional Amendment Bill aimed at providing reservation for women in the Lower House and State Assemblies, following an initial failure to pass.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPSTVKRHVGUXlhNjVqNEczYkNpd1NvbmRYOU5Fd2RIZjV3OHBob0owSzh3LVRXdUVqSDNVZTgtbVZlUG8ybS1wallfSVdTeTRtNENIU0lwV3piczdxV2NEVmE0WC1GSTQyMjR4dkNPb1pqblB2SzNHQjZBRWVXZHpPZXE2bVlQc3NGNEFJVU1NUHJMMFFqSkdRUVFFMGZNRUkzSTc0LXphM1JaLXM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I16</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I17</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Citizenship and Rights:</strong> The Supreme Court emphasized that citizenship determinations must follow a fair and reasoned process, while the Centre confirmed it will introduce sex education in schools and colleges nationwide.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I21</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiugFBVV95cUxPSi05T19nQ3pMdDVrOENrazA2ZlJBMW5Bc1JaV0dIaDNyN3Npd3Fndll4Q1RKVWhnd1FNb3NJRjI3MUFZQmpGeTFZbnprdElwT0VaVUp2VDE0ODY2bHM0WDJscmstVU95UGpSSlhTZmNoSDcxQ0V4Q0pJTDRWQ0JaeWdNQzJLREd2TWZjOVk1RmFkYzlKZVdmc3otVTlnX0NieURGeTZVNFRtMHdXN1gteDVmWjRkVW5DZGc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I24</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I25</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Trade Regulation:</strong> The government has amended its foreign trade policy to explicitly prohibit the import of goods produced using forced labour.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqAFBVV95cUxOZWNaYkJtLVBpdGNBZ1ZsV0lMV0lRN1lPYzdTLUhPa09yMV9SVlN5YzR2Q2ZOaXpJZVl2ZWNYbHdWUUo1MHlCOTRQak1uRXROOTljYnBIbUR4LUphWEFUZ2VkaGxlU2FIdHQ3WW5TUm5PM2ZodEI2c3JLZzdLX3hRTzhRWEw0ekhuVlFPcl9yQUxxN29EYTVDX0dIQTRpaEZTelJVbGVScGs?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W9</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisgFBVV95cUxQQ0c5N0h4aGdCR1pYOUc2Z0ZTZlVIeE13UjB0RGJNY3ZERlYxcWlFdUFpWWI1WXc3R0Y4UFRDcUhsUzJDUXhFdURNSS1uNjBkeVo5aTQ2VFVCYnZYeGFRSkRGUFdIRmJ2U0FkM2JGR2FRZjZ1SWJwUTU0ai1nQ1MxcEFzajgxQmtCZnQ3RXVGVk9ybENsRC1WV280OHBIVWR1N1VpRWtoTk5ycWJhN0lGMmhR0gG_AUFVX3lxTE1tVVZpNnpSWXJnTWFJd2E2ZkxFRmx6V2N4cGhkenpfbl8xNWNGdmh0WHl6OUkyd2t0eHdFNERLRklWdnVaOHJkX0hiZjRYbzR3ZnZxWHFQUjBIcG5LMXpTQmxGMXJxTU55YWk5NjdwdGNhRkQ2a3BrQ1FBVk5YWlRqNEJOUWg1cnBUZnp6bjk2MDE4YTBEWGxZMEwxekYzQ2VrVE1fZEwyZ3FGM2hyNkgzRjI2SmZzT3ZkMnhHOFhB?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W11</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Election Commission Oversight:</strong> Former Chief Election Commissioner SY Quraishi has criticized the Election Commission for alleged unfairness toward the opposition, a charge the BJP countered by citing past Congress-era criticisms of the institution.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W3</a></span></li>
</ul>
